description_long: This house features a striking central cylindrical tower with a conical terracotta roof, surrounded by a rectangular main structure with white and light gray stone-textured walls. The facade is adorned with arched windows, decorative columns, and small balconies, giving it a stately and somewhat Mediterranean appearance. The main entrance is marked by a prominent overhanging roof, flanked by two columns and a set of steps leading up to double doors. Several smaller conical-roofed turrets accent the corners and sides, adding architectural interest. The property is landscaped with tall, slender trees and a manicured lawn, set on a square plot. The overall design blends classical and Mediterranean influences, with a focus on symmetry and decorative stonework.
description: A stately house with a central cylindrical tower, conical terracotta roofs, arched windows, and decorative stonework, set on a landscaped plot with tall trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, a prominent overhanging roof, two columns, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the central tower, large arched windows, and a clear view of the conical roof and side balconies.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cylindrical tower, multiple arched windows, and vertical stone columns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring two small conical-roofed turrets, symmetrical window arrangements, and a clear view of the landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with arched and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Grand double-door entry with steps, overhanging conical roof, and flanking columns
